scope: Bounded English Wikipedia rolling revision monitor for highly contested live article classes.

provenance.purpose: Rolling revision harness pack for high-volatility Wikipedia pages that stress narrative, epistemic, and reviewer-support surfaces.

notes: Political biography chosen for heavy revision churn and wording disputes around accusations, events, and framing.
Use as a volatility-first ingest and issue-packet test, not as a truth authority source.
Political biography selected as a historically high-edit and high-reversion article.
Useful for revision deltas involving event chronology, policy wording, and attribution surfaces.
Ongoing conflict page selected for persistent wording and casualty-framing disputes.
Expected to pressure-test epistemic deltas, source attribution changes, and abstention handling.
Disputed place page selected for overlapping geographic, political, and religious framing changes.
Useful for place-linked issue packets and contested descriptor changes.
Religious article selected for historical-versus-theological wording disputes.
Useful for testing claim-bearing-step changes and epistemic qualification surfaces.
Religious article selected for recurring disputes about wording, sources, and representational sensitivity.
Useful for issue packets where attribution and epistemic posture matter more than raw text churn.
Science page selected because political framing and denialist edits create meaningful semantic drift risk.
Useful for extraction deltas involving causes, impacts, and sourced claims.
Medicine/science page selected for rapid updates, politicized wording, and high source volatility.
Useful for stressing revision summaries, claim-bearing-step changes, and reviewer-facing packet triage.
